title: Sharpend Corners
description: Makes all the GUI corners really sharp and less round, Thats all.
body:
### GUI SCALE 2 or 4 RECOMMENDED!

Sharpend Corners is a resource pack that makes all your corners in menu's look sharp instead of rounded

![Comparison between vanilla and with pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c8d358a87cb16d70d5d858f59e9914b005d4f1.png)
